summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CIPOLATTI Access Control System. Backend APIs are 71% functional with critical photo upload issues. Frontend authentication and navigation working, but session management has issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Photo upload returns 500 error 'Falha ao enviar foto'
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks photo attachment functionality for carregamentos

critical_bugs.issue: Photo upload returns 422 error - missing required query parameters
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks photo attachment functionality for fleet

storage_issues.issue: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY storage service not properly configured

authentication_issues.issue: User sessions expire quickly, redirecting to login page
authentication_issues.impact: Users get logged out frequently during navigation

navigation_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /carregamentos or /relatorios redirects to login
navigation_issues.impact: Users cannot bookmark or directly access specific pages

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@portaria.com / admin123)
Dashboard loading with correct statistics and CIPOLATTI branding
Created 15 agendamentos of all types (carregamento, visitante, funcionario, diretoria, frota)
Entry processing - converted 7 agendamentos to active records
Exit/return functionality for carregamentos and fleet
All CRUD operations for agendamentos, carregamentos, fleet, visitors, employees, directors
Report generation for all entity types
Navigation menu and main application structure
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix photo upload functionality - configure EMERGENT_LLM_KEY storage service properly and fix fleet photo upload API parameters. Fix session management to prevent frequent logouts. These are blocking issues for the main requirements (photo attachments and printing with photos).

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (authentication works, navigation partially works, session issues)
